sections.paragraph:
ὑπουργέω (ὑπουργός contr. form of ὑποεργός ‘rendering service’ [cp. ὑπουργία IMakedD 590, 4]) fut. 2 sg. ὑπουργήσεις (2 Km 9:10 Aq.) be helpful, assist (Aeschyl., Hdt. et al.; pap; TestDan 3, 4; Philo, Vi. Cont. 72; Jos., Ant. 3, 7) εἴς τι in or at someth. (Eunap., Vi. Soph. p. 108) MPol 13:1.—DELG s.v. ἔργον.

contr. contr. = contracted, -action

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

IMakedD IMakedD =Ἡ Μακεδονία κ.τ.λ., ed. MDimitsas—List 3

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

TestDan TestDan = Testament of Dan, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

someth. someth. = something

Eunap Eunap , IV–V a.d.—List 5

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1042
